Package com.ibm.cloud.continuous_delivery.cd_tekton_pipeline.v2.model

Class TriggerScmTrigger

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.GenericModel
      • com.ibm.cloud.continuous_delivery.cd_tekton_pipeline.v2.model.Trigger
        • com.ibm.cloud.continuous_delivery.cd_tekton_pipeline.v2.model.TriggerScmTrigger
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.ObjectModel
    public class TriggerScmTrigger
extends Trigger
    Git trigger type. It automatically triggers a pipeline run when the Tekton Pipeline Service receives a corresponding Git webhook event.

      static interface  TriggerScmTrigger.Events
      List of events.
